text:
Ok, I’ve been looking for this YTP for a while now. It was a YTP that had something like “Gay Bowser" in the title and I remember the upload date was most likely before 2010, and it didn’t have that many fews back in the day. 
 ———————————————————————————
As for the video itself, all I can remember is that it was a Hotel Mario youtube poop, it had the song "Barbie Girl" in it, they called Bowser gay a few times, and that at one point there was a sign that said "CONDOMS" somewhere in the video. I looked everywhere and I found a few old school Hotel Mario YTP’s from the 2000’s that didn’t match up to what I remember seeing. Does anyone who was active in the 2000’s remember what I just described?
author: @alex_harnar_618

Holy shit, memories.
